title: After the Nikkei Shinshun Hai: A Whole New Me ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer gives it her all in the Nikkei
Shinshun Hai. Her party attitude and performance
takes a firm grip on the hearts of the fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer's next goal is an all-important race
to the Mejiro family—the spring Tenno Sho. She
trembles with fear and excitement for the
unknown.
